debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ one_to_one (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A)

proof:
by
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (h.symm))
failed_attempts:
intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h.symm)

unfold one_to_one
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm)
successful_attempts:
by
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (h.symm))

by
  unfold one_to_one
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (h.symm))

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) (by simpa [h])

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h.symm)

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) h.symm)

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  exact subset_antisymm (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h)
    (subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) (by simpa [h]))

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) h.symm

by
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply subset_antisymm
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X1) (X2 := X2) h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) (by simpa [h])

by
  intro X1 X2 h

  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq (A := A) (X1 := X2) (X2 := X1) (by simpa [eq_comm] using h)

  intro X1 X2 h
